series_metadata.series_description: All records which document the expenditure & use of federal monies awarded to state agencies.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Unknown: Uniform record retention requirements federal awards, as determined by U.S. Office of Management and Budget, are set forth in U.S. Code of Federal Regulations at 2 CFR 200.334 and are generally three years from a specified date. Refer 2 CFR 200.334 determine commencement of 3-year period each type of record. Some federal programs mandate retention requirements specific program. Statutory and regulatory provisions applicable specific programs take precedence over uniform record retention requirements. ; Electronic: HOME INVESTMENT PARTNERSHIP (HOME): retention governed by 24 CFR 91.508(c). Records each FY must be retained most recent 5-year period, except homeownership project records must be retained project completion date & written agreements must be retained agreement ends. commencement of 5-year retention period rental housing projects, tenant-based rental assistance projects, & displacements and acquisition see 24 CFR 91.508(c). If litigation, claim, negotiation, audit, monitoring, inspection or other action has commenced before record retention period ends records must be retained later of completion of action & resolution of issues or end of required period. ALL OTHER PROGRAMS: 3 years from date of submission of final expenditure report or, awards renewed quarterly or annually, from date of submission of quarterly/annual financial report as reported Federal awarding agency or pass-through entity. ; Paper: period specified electronic format
retention_rules.disposition_method: Unknown: Other ; Electronic: Erase ; Paper: Shred
